---
title: "Logistics"
---

- Lodging at Chautauqua at the foot of the Flatiron mountains in Boulder, CO
- Transportation
    - *TBD*

# Agenda

| Default        | Left | 
|----------------|:-----|
| September 12th | Arrival and lunch (*provided*) |
|                | Welcome keynote |
|                | “Campfire” discussions |
|                | Group dinners (OYO[^ONO]) & planning |
| September 13th | Morning breakfast (*provided*) & planning |
|                | Outdoor activities |
|                | Lunch (*provided*) |
|                | Afternoon sessions & fun/dinner (*OYO*) |
| September 14th | Morning breakfast (*provided*) |
|                | Group talks/sessions |
|                | Outdoor activities (find your way home) |

# Activities
    - Hiking
    - Biking
    - Climbing
    - Trail running

[^ONO]: "On Your Own"
